tagline: AI-powered DeFi yield farming portfolio engine with on-chain APY verification
description: initFarm analyzes DeFi protocols using on-chain data to verify APY claims, quantify risk with a 6-factor model, and construct optimized portfolios. It uses InterwovenKit for wallet connection and Initia-native features including Auto-Sign sessions and .init username support.
initia_features: InterwovenKit wallet connection (Privy social login, MetaMask, Keplr)
